title: Capable language models can outgrow the benefits of collaboration
summary:
Nature Machine Intelligence, Published online: 24 July 2026; doi:10.1038/s42256-026-01268-y

A controlled study of large language model agents across 260 configurations shows when multi-agent collaboration helps or hurts performance, and introduces a predictive model that selects the best architecture in 87% of held-out within-domain configurations.
